use_cases: Display customer testimonials on landing pages to build social proof and credibility
Showcase user feedback with animated text reveals on hero sections
Feature client quotes with avatars for team or about pages
Create rotating testimonial displays for testimonial sections
Highlight user endorsements for conversion-focused pages
ai_summary: A clean testimonial carousel component featuring animated text reveals with blur and opacity transitions. Displays customer quotes with professional avatars, names, roles, and company affiliations. Includes image preloading for smooth transitions and uses staggered word animations for elegant text appearance. Designed for SaaS and tech landing pages seeking minimal, professional social proof displays.
